_comment: Example redaction-gateway config. Run: overfit gateway --config this-file.json (set the upstream key in $OPENAI_API_KEY). CLI flags (--upstream/--port/...) override these values.
_clientKeys_comment: Gateway-issued keys callers must send as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'. Prefer the env var $OVERFIT_GATEWAY_KEYS for real secrets; keys here are merged with it. Omit/empty = open gateway (dev only).
_scanResponses_comment: Also scan model responses and mask secrets/PII the model itself produced (leaked system prompt, RAG-echoed doc). Non-streaming only; the caller's own redacted values are still restored. Default false.

policy._comment: Per-category action: Block (refuse the request), Redact (replace + restore), Alert (forward but log), Allow (ignore). Unknown categories fall back to default.
